task: Find 10 papers related to web agents published on arXiv between January 2023 and September 2024 (based on the submission time of the first version). For each paper, provide the paper name, a link to the pdf, the name and the affiliation of the first author and submission time of the first version on arXiv.
graderReasoning: The user requested 10 papers related to 'web agents' published on arXiv between January 2023 and September 2024. For each paper, the agent needed to provide the paper name, a link to the PDF, the name and affiliation of the first author, and the submission time of the first version. The agent successfully performed an arXiv API search with the specified date range and keyword, identifying 37 relevant papers. It then selected 11 promising candidates and proceeded to extract the required details. While the initial attempts to extract affiliations from arXiv API metadata and PDF text extraction tools failed, the agent demonstrated strong problem-solving by switching to ar5iv HTML pages and, for one paper (WebCanvas), by opening the PDF in the browser and using a screenshot to manually extract the affiliation. The agent then compiled a list of 10 papers, providing all the requested information in the correct format. The final output is accurate and complete, meeting all user requirements.
